summary: The actual screenshot closely matches the described multiplayer lobby UI with metadata, slots, and actions, but the provided wireframe is a poor representation that merely echoes the prompt text instead of depicting the required elements, resulting in significant mismatches.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both the actual screenshot and wireframe feature a dark background with starfield elements.

correctElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-MULTIPLAYER-LOBBY: The Multiplayer lobby screen must visually satisfy the documented screen description
correctElements.evidence: Both images display 'Multiplayer Lobby' as the main title in a similar terminal-style font and green color.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: thin green panel borders
correctElements.evidence: Both images use thin green borders around primary panels.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-MULTIPLAYER-LOBBY: Wide framed panel with lobby metadata at top
incorrectElements.expected: Top section with lobby metadata like Host, Map, Game Mode
incorrectElements.actual: Top section contains 'RiskyStars Fleet command interface' and prompt description text, no metadata
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe does not depict the required metadata elements; instead, it shows unrelated title and prompt text.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-MULTIPLAYER-LOBBY: commander slot table in the middle
incorrectElements.expected: Table with player slots, types, and remove buttons
incorrectElements.actual: Empty space with no table or slots present
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe lacks the central commander slot table entirely, which is a key component of the lobby screen.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-MULTIPLAYER-LOBBY: ready buttons at the right
incorrectElements.expected: Ready buttons positioned at the right of the slots
incorrectElements.actual: No ready buttons; instead, bottom buttons are 'CREATE / CONTINUE' and 'BACK / CANCEL'
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe omits ready buttons and includes incorrect bottom actions not matching the description.

incorrectElements.expected: Actions like review note and launch controls
incorrectElements.actual: Bottom buttons 'CREATE / CONTINUE' and 'BACK / CANCEL', with no review note
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe shows generic buttons not aligned with described lobby actions; missing instructional note.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-AUDIT-001: Every documented UI screen must have a direct prompt-rendered wireframe at 1536x832 for screenshot comparison
incorrectElements.expected: Precise layout baseline matching screen description
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe displays prompt text verbatim instead of rendered UI elements
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The wireframe fails to provide a visual baseline for comparison, as it does not render the described UI structure.

incorrectElements.requirement: TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001: The actual screenshot must be captured from the RiskyStars client HWND at 1536x832
incorrectElements.expected: Exact pixel match possible with wireframe
incorrectElements.actual: Screenshots may have minor DPI or scaling differences not visible in provided images
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Even if layout matches, image attachments are scaled, introducing potential for undetected minor discrepancies in bounds or DPI.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe does not accurately represent the key UI elements described in the prompt, such as metadata, slot table, ready buttons, and actions; it instead renders the descriptive text itself, making it ineffective for validating the functional and technical requirements.
missingRequirements: Visual depiction of lobby metadata at top
Commander slot table with slots, types, and remove actions
Bottom lobby actions and instructional notes
Absence of extraneous elements like 'RiskyStars Fleet command interface'
recommendedWireframeChanges: Redraw the wireframe to include all described UI elements using simple rectangles and labels as per global style
Remove placeholder prompt text and replace with actual UI components
Ensure fixed screen-relative geometry matches the 1536x832 resolution precisely
Incorporate semi-transparent black panels and terminal-style labels consistently
